name: NodeGoat ReDoS — nested-quantifier regex on profile input causes catastrophic backtracking

provenance.note: Both sides verbatim-real: NodeGoat master ships the vulnerable nested-quantifier regex /([0-9]+)+\#/ live in handleProfileUpdate and the documented safe single-quantifier form /([0-9]+)\#/ as an adjacent commented 'The Fix' line. Diff inverts the documented fix.

notes: Coverage gap closed by new rule B-18. NodeGoat ReDoS tutorial.
